Far North Bear Claws.name: Far North Bear Claws
Far North Bear Claws.description:
This set of knuckles designed to aid in hand-to-hand combat. They are crafted to resemble a giant bear's claws, made of steel, and feature a slot at the top of each knuckle for placing enchanted gems. However, heavy use might cause the gem to shatter, resulting in the loss of its enchantment.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Belt.name: Far North Belt
Far North Belt.description: Built from layers of hardened leather, cloth, and insulating white fox fur, this belt protects against deep northern cold. Its main utility is to hold easily accessible pouches and potions, as well as heavy weaponry such as swords or hammers.

Far North Boots.name: Far North Boots
Far North Boots.description: Boots crafted from oiled sealskin and fox pelt reach to the knee, their inward-facing fur offering warmth. Due to their rigid, stiff nature, experienced travelers always soften them at a campfire or put a thick felted sock to slide them on comfortably.

Far North Cape.name: Far North Cape
Far North Cape.description: The heavy, hooded cloak is made from the hide of a great white bear, rendering it one of the heaviest capes available. Following a lengthy curing process, Leatherworkers must cut the hide, stain it a deep shade with a specialize dye, and line the interior with additional fur for warmth.

Far North Cloth.name: Far North Cloth
Far North Cloth.description:
Made from the wool of the moose, the greasy felt is heavy, dense, and water-resistant. It is never worn as a fine garment, but rather to protect the body from the harsh Northern elements, it's main drawback being noticeably heavy.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Crown.name: Far North Crown
Far North Crown.description: Far North Crown is not a symbol of authority but rather one of dominance over the frozen wasteland. Generally made from iron, and on some occasion even from pelt, the crown does not signify that the wearer rules people, but that they have mastered the land itself.

Far North Dye.name: Far North Dye
Far North Dye.description: Far North Dye is ground from purple ochre, a rare variant of the ochre gemstone, which is ground into a fine powder. Though uncommon in the region, it is one of the most frequently used dyes in the northern realms, as it provides strong visibility from a distance on the light colored pelts it is typically applied to.

Far North Epaulets.name: Far North Epaulets
Far North Epaulets.description: Far North Epaulets are crafted from the pelts and fur of arctic wolves, mounted on a sturdy leather base, and bound together with steel bolts. Beyond providing protection from large animal bites and axe blows, they also serve to secure the wearer's cape in place.

Far North Gloves.name: Far North Gloves
Far North Gloves.description: Made from three specific layers, one on top of the other to provide protection in cold environments. The inside layer features soft fox fur for warmth, the middle layer consists of felted wool for further insulation, and the outside layer is made from heavy hide to be water resistant.

Far North Great Axe.name: Far North Great Axe
Far North Great Axe.description:
The head of this massive axe is made from a single piece of black, frozen iron found only in the heart of deep glaciers. While very few blacksmiths know how to work it, it is believed that divine intervention is needed to complete the making of this axe.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Hammer.name: Far North Hammer
Far North Hammer.description:
Steel-made weapon and utility tool intended for cleaving through frozen landscapes and breaching battlefield defenses. It is designed to be as versatile as possible while remaining easy to carry, either on a belt or within a backpack.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Helm.name: Far North Helm
Far North Helm.description: Made primarily of hardened pelt and fox fur, with two narwhal tusks protruding from each side, it is built to last and remain sturdy in harsh northern climates. Due to its padded nature, it is also quite well equiped to handle a devastating blow.

Far North Pants.name: Far North Pants
Far North Pants.description: Leatherworkers use heavy and thick leather from Nordic bears or seals to make these, cutting the material loosely to allow for unrestricted movement and to accommodate additional woolen layers worn underneath for protection from the elements.

Far North Ring.name: Far North Ring
Far North Ring.description: Primarily made out of stone and marked with the symbols of a specific tribe or village, this item is more of a memento of home. It holds no monetary value, however, some collectors are interesting in them as all of them are unique, as they are not made by experienced jewelers, but by masons.

Far North Shortbow.name: Far North Shortbow
Far North Shortbow.description:
Made from an alloy of steel and brass to be as flexible as possible, with a string fashioned from steel and nickel, this shortbow requires the strength of a giant to be fully drawn. The user must be careful, as applying more strength than necessary can permanently bend the bow, rendering it unusable, they must be powerful but graceful.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Staff.name: Far North Staff
Far North Staff.description:
A walking aid, a tool, and a weapon, this staff is a length of driftwood recovered from the cold northern shores. At its end, it has a gemmed cap with an enchanted gem that is favored by the user. Usually, the enchantments used are those that protect from extreme cold temperatures.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Far North Vambrances.name: Far North Vambrances
Far North Vambrances.description: These vambraces are designed to protect the forearms from biting wind and freezing temperatures. They form a sealed connection with the wearer's gloves to block out cold and are lined with fur for added warmth, creating a barrier against the extreme cold environment.

Forest Sickle.name: Forest Sickle
Forest Sickle.description:
Primarily made out of bone or flint and either cattails, tree vines or thatch for the handle. It is usually used by the forest inhabitants, that helps them primarily with harvesting any sustenance from the forest, or for clearing paths for safe traveling for all.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Golden Moon Dagger.name: Golden Moon Dagger
Golden Moon Dagger.description:
Made from the rare metals that can be found in rivers by panning, usually electrum as it has a beautiful reflection that matches the moonglow, the forest folk that are using it are divided, as the most pure dislike the idea of using an item that can not be replenished in the soil, but others counteract with their beliefs in the many moons deity, and this being a way of respecting them.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Golden Moon Sickle.name: Golden Moon Sickle
Golden Moon Sickle.description:
Made primarily from gathered metals, usually electrum, it does shine in a very specific way that matches the rays of the moonglow between the trees. Being made of a better strength than the regular flint, it tends to last for many generation, and is more seen as a status symbol of sorts as it can be passed from father to son, and this has been done for many moon cycles.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Armor.name: Green Druid Armor
Green Druid Armor.description:
Crafted from layered hides, bark plates, and woven vines, this armor is designed to blend into dense forests. It offers moderate protection while allowing freedom of movement, often adorned with leaves or natural dyes.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Cape.name: Green Druid Cape
Green Druid Cape.description:
Flowing cape made from treated moss fibers and light pelts, dyed in deep greens and browns, after a lengthy tannin process. It aids in camouflage and is sometimes enchanted by the more arcane inclined forest folk or treated to repel water and morning dew, to keep the user dry.


Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Flag.name: Green Druid Flag
Green Druid Flag.description:
A banner woven from plant fibers, such as cat tails, or flax, marked with symbols of the wild, to symbolise either the tribe the owner is a part of, or druidic circle. It is usually carried during rituals or gatherings, representing balance and respect for nature.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Gloves.name: Green Druid Gloves
Green Druid Gloves.description:
Soft leather gloves reinforced with bark strips along the knuckles and the wrist. This allow precise hand movement for spellcasting or gathering herbs, but also keeping the user in connection with nature at all times, while offering light protection.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Helm.name: Green Druid Helm
Green Druid Helm.description:
Headpiece made from shaped wood, sometimes with antler fragments, and leather bindings. It is usually rarely worn, mainly under the situations of danger either to the circle or the forest itself, when battle is unavoidable. It is more ceremonial than practical, often symbolizing rank within the druid circles.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Hood.name: Green Druid Hood
Green Druid Hood.description:
Deep hood stitched from dyed green cloth and hide, often treated to resist rain. It shadows the face and helps conceal identity while traveling through woodland paths, but also protects against bad weather.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Mace.name: Green Druid Mace
Green Druid Mace.description:
Blunt weapon with a wooden shaft and a head reinforced with stone or hardened resin. It is usually made with the intent to mainly to subdue rather than kill, in accordance with certain druidic beliefs, however, it is not unheard of for the weapon's spikes to be sharpened.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Pants.name: Green Druid Pants
Green Druid Pants.description:
Durable leggings made from soft cured tannin leather and plant fibers, like flax. Primarely designed for long travel between circles of druids, they are made specifically to resist tearing from branches and undergrowth.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Pauldrons.name: Green Druid Pauldrons
Green Druid Pauldrons.description:
Deep hood stitched from dyed green cloth and hide, often treated to resist rain. It shadows the face and helps conceal identity while traveling through woodland paths, but also protects against bad weather.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Shoes.name: Green Druid Shoes
Green Druid Shoes.description:
Flexible footwear crafted from soft hide and woven roots, dyed to blend in closely with the terrain. They are quiet on forest floors and provide good grip on uneven terrain, or for climbing, due to the raised front of the shoe.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Staff.name: Green Druid Staff
Green Druid Staff.description:
Long wooden staff grown or carved, by master craftsmen, from a single branch, often embedded with either stones, gemstones or wrapped in vines. It serves as both a walking aid and a focus for druidic arcane power.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Green Druid Vambraces.name: Green Druid Vambraces
Green Druid Vambraces.description:
Forearm guards made from leather and thin wood plates, or hardened tannin leather. The gear is aimed to protect protect against scratches and minor blows while allowing full arm movement. If the vambrances are gemmed usually tends to provide a signal of status, or leadership.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Hunter's Claws.name: Hunter's Claws
Hunter's Claws.description:
Pair of curved sharpened blades worn over the fingers, mimicking the talons of beasts, usually in sets of three or for. Used by hunters for close combat or climbing difficult terrains or trees, however, the appearance of the silhouette of the users can be really intimidating.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Legacy of the Moon Belt.name: Legacy of the Moon Belt
Legacy of the Moon Belt.description:
Flowing cape made from treated moss fibers and light pelts, dyed in deep greens and browns, after a lengthy tannin process. It aids in camouflage and is sometimes enchanted by the more arcane inclined forest folk or treated to repel water and morning dew, to keep the user dry.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Stone Dagger.name: Stone Dagger
Stone Dagger.description:
Small simple blade carved from flint or some other harder materials such as a obsidian, bound to a short wooden hilt with sinew or fiber. Often used in rituals, hunting, or as a last resort weapon, it is easy to make but easily prone to chipping if used against harder materials.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Stone Spear.name: Stone Spear
Stone Spear.description:
Wooden shaft tipped with a sharpened stone head, usually flint or obsidian, secured with sinew bindings. Common among most hunters hunters, it is reliable and easy to either make or repair on the spot in the wild.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Totem Staff.name: Totem Staff
Totem Staff.description:
A carved staff bearing symbols or small effigies representing spirits or ancestors. Each marking tells a story, expanding out for generations, and it is often used in rituals or, depending on the size of the staff, as a sign of authority.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.

Witch Staff.name: Witch Staff
Witch Staff.description:
Slender, twisted staff made from aged wood, that resembles a hook, sometimes capped with bone, crystal, carved wood, or metal. It is used as a channeling tool for the arcane casters, often personalized to its wielder’s craft.

Note for DMs

This item possesses no fixed stats, this is by design. The GM/DM is advised to modify the stats to best fit their world, setting and story. Due to those factors, all stats can vary wildly.
